name: s01-citation-gate-fails-on-dangling-cite
notes: A \cite key with no .bib entry is the #1 research failure mode — must record a failed verdict.

name: s03-citation-gate-fails-on-dangling-ref
notes: A \ref with no \label is an undefined cross-reference.

name: s04-citation-gate-ignores-commented-cite
notes: Regression: a \cite inside a TeX comment must NOT count as a real citation.

name: s05-citation-gate-fails-on-multikey-partial
notes: Multi-key \citep{a,b} where one key is undefined must fail.
